---
title: "Set up vignettes for download from GitHub"
author: "John Maindonald"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GITready}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

This "vignette" records steps that can be followed when a vignette 
is changed or added, prior to committing changes that include static
html files to GitHub.

```{r exampleCode, eval=F}
tools::buildVignettes(dir = ".", lib.loc='~/pkgs/PGRcode', tangle=TRUE)
if(!dir.exists('inst/doc')dir.create("inst/doc")
## On installation, files in 'inst/doc/' are copied to 'doc/'
file.copy(dir("vignettes", full.names=TRUE), "inst/doc", overwrite=TRUE)
```
